_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:pi-sandbox
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-02 (crew leto; operator made sandbox THE priority — unlock for Pi + DGX local models). Pi-in-a-sandbox via srt; both platforms mac-first; v1 network=OPEN. SPIKE hk-f39ny CLEARED 2026-07-03 (br/comms over unix socket + live model call proven; enableWeakerNetworkIsolation=FALSE secure; Go-CLI-TLS v1-irrelevant). Build chain underway: hk-p7smp profile-gen MERGED (0236ccb5) -> hk-rlxgx argv-wrap (in progress) -> hk-6596l config -> hk-i0377 acceptance; hk-ryi34 attach + hk-5zviv linux (P2). WATCH for the flagless-REQUEST_CHANGES review-wedge (hk-thbbv) on the remaining beads. Artifacts: .kerf/works/pi-sandbox/ + plans/2026-07-02-pi-sandbox/. epic_id:null (kerf work) — ready-count via label.

lanes.label: codename:stall-sentinel

gate.reason: PLANNED not staffed. Kerf work created 2026-07-02 (design+7 beads) for a deterministic stall/wedge detector + tiered escalation (the operator's 'fleet must not stall' fix; captain-relayed task). Un-gate + staff after the sandbox completes (admiral rec), OR sooner via gurney if operator wants stall-protection now. Signal library hk-mxxsl gates the detectors.

lanes.note: Deterministic (no-LLM) sentinel: detect off events.jsonl (NOT tmux), two-layer algo (Layer A per-run stall: heartbeat-gap/review-stall/run-age; Layer B lane no-forward-progress+guard), tiered escalate crew->captain->operator, daemon-integrated Go, config thresholds fail-loud. Beads: hk-mxxsl signal-lib (P1 GATE), hk-l087e Layer-A, hk-r9n2s Layer-B, hk-hm09z config, hk-u9thq escalation, hk-vnsme acceptance, hk-sljlg watch-consume. Companion daemon FIX = hk-thbbv (flagless REQUEST_CHANGES=APPROVE). Brief: plans/2026-07-02-stall-sentinel/DESIGN.md; artifacts .kerf/works/stall-sentinel/.

lanes.label: codename:pilot
lanes.note: PROVEN + PARKED 2026-07-02. Pi runs live end-to-end (hk-d5q5l on agent_type=pi, gpt-5.4-mini via OpenRouter, merged 2min). CAPABILITY: gpt-5.4-mini does trivial doc beads but exits-without-committing on real Go. OPERATOR: HOLD Pi until the sandbox lands, then test DGX/local + a couple models via the sandbox. AUTH: Pi is on OpenRouter (sk-or- key); operator PREFERS Pi's own OpenAI SUBSCRIPTION (~/.pi/agent) — needs harness change hk-ecoh8 (native-auth, no injected key). Config reverted to open-weight minimax/minimax-m3 (correct OpenRouter pairing). Routing footgun: harness:pi LABEL required (hk-ytzj2).
